name: ConvertFrom-SecureString

options.name: -AsPlainText
options.description: When set, `ConvertFrom-SecureString` will convert secure strings to the decrypted plaintext string as output.

options.name: -Key
options.description: Specifies the encryption key as a byte array.

options.name: -SecureKey
options.description: Specifies the encryption key as a secure string. The secure string value is converted to a byte array before being used as the key.

options.name: -SecureString
options.description: Specifies the secure string to convert to an encrypted standard string.

description: Converts a secure string to an encrypted standard string.
